summary: Avionics Systems Engineer with 16+ years of experience spanning hands-on integration at PAC Kamra, SAAB 2000 Erieye AEW&C fleet maintenance, and JF-17 Thunder Block III development at CADI Chengdu. Strong expertise in mission computer integration, EW suite design, glass cockpit systems, and weapons qualification testing. MS Avionics Engineering with extensive cross-cultural engineering collaboration across Pakistan, China, and Sweden.

experience.title: Aerospace Systems Integration Lead
bullets: Led avionics and weapons systems integration for JF-17 Thunder Block III at CADI, Chengdu
Oversaw integration testing of indigenous mission computer, EW suite, and glass cockpit avionics
Supported flight test campaigns for weapons integration and systems qualification
Contributed to indigenous systems development replacing legacy Chinese and Russian components
Managed cross-cultural engineering coordination between Pakistani and Chinese technical teams

experience.title: Integrated Systems & Design Specialist
bullets: Designed and integrated avionics subsystems for military aircraft platforms at PAC Kamra production facility
Performed system-level testing, verification, and validation of integrated avionics suites
Created technical documentation for design reviews, configuration baselines, and test procedures
Supported production line engineering for avionics installation and wiring harness integration

experience.title: Maintenance Support Engineer, AEW&C Aircraft
bullets: Managed maintenance engineering for SAAB 2000 Erieye AEW&C fleet (9 aircraft) encompassing radar and mission systems
Performed technical fault diagnosis at system and subsystem level for complex avionics
Ensured operational readiness through structured maintenance scheduling and resource allocation

experience.title: Faculty — Systems Engineering
bullets: Teaches Systems Engineering courses to aeronautical engineering students
Coordinates research projects and industry-academia linkages in aerospace domain

certifications: Introduction to Systems Engineering Specialization — CU Boulder / Lockheed Martin
